stemHtml: Which of the following statements is correct?

options.a: Hydraulic fluids are considered incompressible and often cause irritation to the skin and eyes.
options.b: Hydraulic fluids are interchangeable when the compressibility ratio of both is the same.
options.c: Mineral-based hydraulic fluid is dyed purple for identification purposes.
options.d: Hydraulic fluids have a high viscosity because one purpose is also to lubricate the pumps and actuators.
